hero.title: Caring for those who
hero.subtitle: At doctore.ar we develop technology and services designed especially for medical professionals. We simplify your management so you can focus on what you do best: caring for your patients.

turnosmedicos.title: TurnosMedicos: The platform that transforms your practice
turnosmedicos.description: Comprehensive appointment management system designed with love for healthcare professionals. Automate your schedule, reduce no-shows, and improve your patients' experience.
turnosmedicos.feature1Desc: Automatic appointment management with WhatsApp and email reminders
turnosmedicos.feature2Desc: Self-service portal for patients to book whenever they want
turnosmedicos.feature3Desc: Secure access to medical files from any device
turnosmedicos.feature4Desc: Clear statistics to make better decisions

services.title: Professional services for your medical practice
services.subtitle: Beyond software, we offer comprehensive solutions to make your practice run optimally.
services.service1Desc: We configure your practice's technology infrastructure: secure networks, professional WiFi, and reliable connectivity for all your medical devices.
services.service2Desc: Specialized accounting management service for healthcare professionals. Electronic invoicing, taxes, and financial consulting.
services.service3Desc: We advise you on digitizing your medical practice. From equipment selection to management system implementation.

pricing.title: Plans designed for every stage of your practice
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best suits your needs. No surprises, no fine print.

about.title: We understand your profession because we respect it
about.text1: We are a team passionate about technology and committed to healthcare. We believe medical professionals deserve tools that simplify their lives, not complicate them.
about.text2: Every line of code we write is designed to save you time, reduce administrative stress, and allow you to dedicate more energy to what really matters: your patients.

contact.title: We're here to help
contact.description: Have questions? Want to learn more about our services? Write to us and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...

footer.tagline: Technology and services designed especially for healthcare professionals.
